description: World's 3rd largest foundry by revenue. Two fabs in Singapore: one 200mm and one 300mm facility. 2023 $4B expansion raised Singapore capacity to ~1.5M 300mm wafers/year. Also acquired Advanced Micro Foundry (silicon photonics) in Singapore Nov 2025. Additional fabs in Dresden (Germany) and Malta, NY (USA). FY2025 revenue: $6.79B USD. Market cap ~$26B USD.

majorSuppliers: ACCRETECH/Tokyo Seimitsu (CMP-0001) - CMP, probing, dicing equipment
_externalRelationships.notes: Owned by Mubadala Investment Company (Abu Dhabi). NASDAQ listed. Singapore is key manufacturing hub. Accretech Singapore Pte. Ltd. serves GF directly. Specialty/mature node focus.
